params.name: links
params.description: Array of footer link items.

params.name: url
params.description: Href for the footer link item. The legacy `URL` key is also supported.

params.name: label
params.description: Visible label for the footer link item.

params.name: external
params.description: Adds a right-side launch icon for external links.

params.name: iconName
params.description: Optional shared icon name for the footer link. Defaults to `ChevronLeft` for left icons and `Launch` for right icons.

params.name: iconPosition
params.description: Optional icon placement for the footer link. Use `left` or `right`.

params.name: iconLeftName
params.description: Optional explicit icon name for the left side of the footer link.

params.name: iconRightName
params.description: Optional explicit icon name for the right side of the footer link.

params.name: showIconLeft
params.description: Forces the left icon on or off for the footer link.

params.name: showIconRight
params.description: Forces the right icon on or off for the footer link.

params.name: iconColor
params.description: Optional icon-only colour override for the footer link.

params.name: size
params.description: Optional icon/text size for the footer link. Use `small` or `medium`.

params.name: openInNewWindow
params.description: Opens the link in a new window and adds `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.

params.name: smallPrint
params.description: Small-print line shown below the support links. Set it to an empty string or `null` to hide it.

params.name: copyright
params.description: Backward-compatible alias for `smallPrint`.

params.name: legalText
params.description: Additional legal copy shown below the small-print line.

params.name: socialLabel
params.description: Optional label shown before the social links. Defaults to `Follow us`.

params.name: socialLinks
params.description: Array of social link items.

params.name: platform
params.description: One of `linkedin`, `x`, `facebook`, `youtube`, `instagram`, or `tiktok`.

params.name: href
params.description: Href for the social link.

params.name: label
params.description: Accessible label override for the social link.

params.name: openInNewWindow
params.description: Opens the social link in a new window.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the footer container.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the footer container.
